description: 1. 100% cottonThe entire front side of the t-shirt is covered with the print. only 4 index colors have been used in this design, which makes it look unique.Look around and name the one dress that's constant everywhere. The answer is easy - t-shirts. Nothing quite like it. And nothing else will be. Supremely comfortable and so easy to wear, a t-shirt is a sheer delight. Its rather easy to try on a hundred t-shirts and never get tired of even one. Somehow T-shirts have the knack of pleasing the body, senses and soul. They are available in eye-catching colours, great designs, fits and sizes. No matter what the occasion, be it to office, outings or parties, T-shirts are a perfect wear and complement your style effortlessly. Go on and get your T-shirts right away.
